projects.title: Lab Login Portal - Frontend
projects.description: A clean, responsive login interface for a homelab management portal. Features form validation, dark/light mode toggle, and accessibility-first design principles.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: A responsive portfolio site with theme toggle, project showcase, contact form, and smooth scroll animations. Built from scratch with modern CSS techniques.

projects.title: Cybersecurity Learning Hub
projects.description: A multi-page educational website introducing cybersecurity fundamentals: common threats, defense strategies, encryption basics, and safe browsing practices for beginners.

projects.title: SOHO Network Design & Setup
projects.description: Designed and documented a Small Office/Home Office network with VLAN segmentation, DHCP server configuration, DNS setup, and secure wireless access using enterprise best practices.

projects.title: Enterprise Network Simulation
projects.description: Built a multi-site enterprise network in Cisco Packet Tracer with OSPF dynamic routing, inter-VLAN routing, access control lists, and redundant WAN links between branch offices.

projects.title: Kali Linux Pentesting Lab
projects.description: Set up Metasploitable 2 as a vulnerable target and performed full reconnaissance, vulnerability scanning, and controlled exploitation using Kali Linux tools with documented methodology.
